title: proofbundle v0.1
description: A portable cryptographic evidence bundle: an Ed25519-signed, RFC 6962 Merkle-anchored payload, optionally carrying an SD-JWT selective-disclosure credential.

payload_b64.description: Base64-encoded payload. The verifier treats it as opaque bytes.

hash_alg.description: RFC 6962 / RFC 9162 SHA-256 tree hashing. REQUIRED (SPEC.md §5) — no `default`: a verifier MUST NOT silently supply this value when the field is absent.

inclusion_proof_b64.description: Sibling hashes of the RFC 6962 inclusion proof, base64-encoded, leaf-to-root order.

compact.description: The SD-JWT in compact serialization (issuer-signed JWT plus ~-separated disclosures).

issuer_public_key_b64.description: Optional issuer Ed25519 public key; if present the verifier checks the issuer signature.

anchors.description: OPTIONAL, EXPERIMENTAL (SPEC.md §7i / the [anchors] extra): external time-anchor evidence, DETACHED from the signed payload. The offline core verifier tolerates but does NOT verify this field; anchors are checked separately (`verify --require-anchor`). A bundle's crypto verdict is identical whether or not it carries anchors.

target.description: What the anchor's canonicalRoot is the root of. Never mixed: a preRegistration anchor cannot validate a receipt target and vice versa.

canonicalRoot.description: Base64 of the canonical root of the anchor's OWN target.

proof.description: Base64 of the type-specific proof (an RFC 3161 token, an OpenTimestamps proof, ...).

anchoredAt.description: RFC 3339 Z, INFORMATIVE only — the trusted time comes from the proof, never this field.

frozen.description: OPTIONAL type-specific material bundled at emit time (e.g. the frozen TSA certificate chain, or an opt-in `policyOid` to pin).
